name: instant-api — 5xx rate > 1% (5m)
description: Page when the instant-api 5xx response-code rate exceeds 1% sustained for 5 minutes. Complements the broader error-rate-high alert (which also includes Fiber-level errors like 4xx + handler panics) by isolating server-side failures that hit a real HTTP response. Sourced from Transaction events emitted by track 3's Fiber NR middleware; httpResponseCode is the standard attribute the Go agent sets on every web Transaction.

nrql.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE httpResponseCode LIKE '5%') FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%'
